label: Disappears comp
description: Causes this hediff to disappear after a set number of ticks.

Class.label: Properties class
Class.description: C# HediffCompProperties type for this list item.

disappearAfterTicks.label: Disappear after ticks
disappearAfterTicks.description: Ticks after which this hediff disappears.

showRemainingTime.label: Show remaining time
showRemainingTime.description: If true, remaining time is shown in the health tab.

canUseDecline.label: Can use decline
canUseDecline.description: If true, severity can decline to trigger disappearance.
